name: Role-Based Access
description: Per-agent budget caps and role-scoped tool allow/deny lists. Assign each agent an identity and restrict which tools it may call based on its role.

reader.description: Read-only access. May query data but never write, delete, or send messages.

analyst.description: Can read data and run non-destructive code. Cannot write to production systems.

operator.description: Full access except destructive shell operations and credential management.

admin.description: Unrestricted — all actions still logged and audited.

rules.name: no-cross-tenant-reads
rules.description: Agents may only query their own tenant's data. Cross-tenant IDs in query args are blocked.

rules.name: no-pii-in-logs
rules.description: Log-writing tools must not emit PII patterns (emails, SSNs, credit cards).

rules.name: require-approval-for-external-send
rules.description: Any tool that sends data externally (email, webhook, Slack) requires human sign-off.
